content: agent1: implementing 'Add custom sorting for palette colors' - adding sort_palette param to Image.quantize() in src/PIL/Image.py, plus tests in Tests/test_image_quantize.py. Will touch quantize() method area.

agent1: added sort_palette=None kwarg to quantize() (right after dither, before closing paren) in src/PIL/Image.py, plus a new _sort_palette() helper method placed after quantize(). Uses remap_palette() internally. Tests/test_image_quantize.py untouched by me yet - about to add tests there now. If you're also editing test_image_quantize.py, let's each append near the end to avoid clobbering.
